text:
Imagine a young girl named Lucy who loves stories. Every evening she listens to a different story every night. One evening, she hears a story about a magical talking bush.

Once upon a time, in a sunlit clearing, there grew an enormous tree. Inside its branches hung blossoms of every color.

Every evening, an old wise owl would visit the bush.

One day the wise owl whispered a secret. The owl said that deep inside the tree's trunk there is a special pear that grants three wishes.

The first wish takes away a memory.

For every wish afterward, a memory returns.

First wish? Forget gravity.

You could hang upside-down all day.

Second wish? Fly anywhere.

No limits. Just stay real.

Third wish? Anything you want.

Except... gravity.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
